description: As a process engineer, maximize the yield of a chemical reaction using Response Surface Methodology (RSM) with the 'ChemReact' dataset from the 'rsm' package. Fit a second-order response surface model (SO) predicting Yield from Time and Temperature while accounting for the Block effect, using the coding formulas x1 = (Time - 85) / 5 and x2 = (Temp - 175) / 5. Determine the optimal reaction Time (minutes) and Temperature (Celsius) to maximize Yield via canonical analysis. Save a contour plot to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/contour_yield.png', a 3D perspective surface plot to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/surface_yield.png', and the optimization results (optimal_time, optimal_temp, and predicted_yield) to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/optimization_results.csv'. The analysis script should be saved to '/home/ga/RProjects/optimize_reaction.R'.
